name: Barbecued Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the garlic into quarters and place on a baking sheet.
2. Place the oregano (or rosemary) sprigs in between each layer of garlic.
3. Drizzle with butter, cover, and bake at 350°F for about an hour until tender.
4. Remove from oven, turn off heat, and serve.
